modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to place graphic on digital signage TV.

full_description_text: User wants to know how to request a graphic. They need a flyer or advertisement on the digital sign. The request is for the Reach Digital sign. The user is not fluent in English and may have difficulty explaining the details.

description: User wants to know how to request a graphic. They need a flyer or advertisement on the digital sign. The request is for the Reach Digital sign. The user is not fluent in English and may have difficulty explaining the details.
